$comment: Mint on the Avenue — Phase 1 seed for salon-platform. Shapes match spec §6 (SalonEntity/StylistEntity/ServiceEntity). REAL DATA ONLY — every section cites its live source. Retrieved 2026-07-07 by Vex from mintontheavenue.com (livecrawl) + Google Places API.

entity.bookingUrl: TO_CONFIRM — 'Book Now via Phorest' target URL not captured from static HTML

gbp.listedName: Mint On The Avenue Aveda Salon

entity.locationNotes: On Park Avenue — near Briar Patch, next to Tabla, in the hallway behind Reynolds Jewelers, by the koi fish ponds

positioning.tagline: A space defined by restraint, craft, and lived-in luxury.
positioning.heroLine: A family-owned and operated Aveda salon on Park Avenue — celebrating five years of devoted color and master cutting.
positioning.philosophy: Every detail is a deliberate choice. We believe in the power of less, executed perfectly. Our botanical Aveda approach to color and cutting is designed to enhance, not mask, your natural texture.
positioning.retail: Complete Aveda collection — pure-fume aromas and botanical formulas

entity.serviceInclusions: Every hair service includes a consultation and Aveda Moment of Wellness (neck & shoulder massage) plus basic styling; color services add shampoo/conditioning, hand massage, and blow-dry. Complimentary Aveda Ritual choice (neck/shoulder massage, hand massage, or sensory journey) per request-appointment page.
entity.stylistLevels: Level 1 through Level 8 artists — all prices are starting rates varying by length, texture, and artist level

owners.text: The salon is owned and operated by Marisa and Mark Evans alongside the Mint team.

team.name: Marisa Evans
team.title: Color Director / Owner
team.bio: Marisa works in dimension — placing light where it lives naturally, pulling warmth from the undertone, building color that photographs like sunlight.

team.name: Sonia Taylor
team.title: Master Stylist / Master Colorist
team.bio: Fifteen years of mastery. Sonia reads texture, bone structure, and what you have not yet said — then gives you the version of yourself you forgot was possible.

team.name: Maribel
team.title: Master Stylist
team.bio: Maribel's highlights catch light the way a Venetian painting does — warmth, depth, a luminosity that feels earned rather than applied.

team.name: Samantha Herrman
team.title: Nail Technician
team.note: Nail services not on the crawled site menu — menu addition to confirm

$teamNote: Canonical roster from Mark 2026-07-07. Titles are free-form DATA (any salon's taxonomy fits — see salon.template.json); optional 'level' int can map members onto the salon's own pricing tiers (Mint: Level 1-8). Maribel spelling confirmed (new-guest page 'Marabel' is the typo).

services.$note: Prices are STARTING RATES in USD, ranging Level 1 → Level 8 artists. '+' preserved from site. Source per category.

items.name: Nutriplenish Treatment Masque
items.note: Deep conditioning, hydrated shine without residue

items.name: Cut — Medium
items.note: As printed on site — medium floor lower than short; likely site typo

items.name: Consultation
items.note: Color planning, bridal, special occasion, or finding the right artist. New Guest Complimentary Consultation also listed on request-appointment page.

promotions.name: New Guest Special — 20% off first visit
promotions.detail: Color, cut, or care. Valid only with select artists: Marisa, Sonia, Marabel (sic), and Ashley. Downloadable gift + book via Phorest.

promotions.name: Referral — $50 off
promotions.detail: Valid only with select artists: Marisa, Erin, Alexus, and Caleb. Downloadable.

discrepanciesFoundOnLiveSources.call: 833 matches Portal README founding example; contact page likely typo — CONFIRM & fix live site
RESOLVED by Mark 2026-07-07: 'Maribel' is canonical — new-guest-special page carries the typo; fix on live site

discrepanciesFoundOnLiveSources.b: Color page: Single Process 65-90+, Partial Ombre 240-320+, Creative/Corrective 70-150+ hourly; no Foilyage/Color Melting/Enlighten & Tone rows

discrepanciesFoundOnLiveSources.call: Crawlers index an empty team page — worth a fix on the live site independent of this project
